title: SideBieSide
description: Open doors that are side-by-side with only one click!
body:
This mod allows the user to open two doors side by side simultaneously. This is to further improve efficiency and realism for all Minecraft players. 

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

DISCLAIMER: This mod does have some known bugs; however, they are very unlikely to affect the average player's experience.

Additional Note(s): The client side of the mod does not check if it's also installed on the server, making for a strange desynchronization bug, though forge is somewhat unaffected with the only symptom being that the other door just closes after the mod updates the block state without server authorization.
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
